title: Pipeline follow-up
goal: Find open opportunities that need attention and create contact tasks for the next action.

steps.description: Confirm the available pipelines and stage IDs.
Pull open opportunities for the requested pipeline or stage.
Create a follow-up task for each selected opportunity contact.

input.title: Follow up on open opportunity
input.body: Opportunity: {{opportunity.name}}. Value: {{opportunity.monetaryValue}}. Confirm next step and decision date.

steps.description: Tag selected contacts so the CRM can filter follow-up work.

output: Return the opportunities reviewed, skipped reasons, and created task IDs.
